title: spilanthes acmella var. uliginosa
intro: Spilanthes acmella var. uliginosa is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the 'Toothache Plant' due to its local use in treating toothaches and other oral health issues. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain, swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Spilanthes acmella var. uliginosa include its ability to soothe mouth sores, reduce gum inflammation, and prevent the formation of plaque. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment for its medicinal properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
